Argentina
Argentina is a country with recorded values of 97.19 in 2001 and 99.14 in 2020.

2001
The year 2001 marks a data point for Argentina with a value of 97.1900024414062.

2020
The year 2020 marks a data point for Argentina with a value of 99.1399993896484.<SEP>The year 2020 with a recorded value of 96.0 for Indonesia.<SEP>Year 2020 with a recorded value of 98.4700012207031 for Philippines.

Brazil
Brazil is a country with recorded data values spanning from 2000 to 2022.

Baseline Data
Baseline Data represents a series of numerical values associated with Brazil across multiple years from 2000 to 2022.<SEP>基线数据包含埃及阿拉伯共和国从2005年到2022年的年度数值记录。<SEP>Baseline Data represents a series of measurements or indicators for India across multiple years from 2001 to 2022.<SEP>Baseline Data represents a series of measurements or indicators for Malaysia across multiple years from 2000 to 2022.<SEP>Baseline Data represents a series of measurements or indices for Thailand across multiple years from 2000 to 2022.
